---
title: "CV"
pagetitle: "CV — Félix P. Leiva"
description: "Curriculum Vitae — Félix P. Leiva."
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

Updated in May 2026

```{=html}
<div class="pdf-toolbar">
  <button type="button" class="pdf-tool-btn" id="pdf-fullscreen-btn">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-expand"></i> Full Screen
  </button>
  <a class="pdf-tool-btn" href="files/cv.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up-right-from-square"></i> Open in New Tab
  </a>
  <a class="pdf-tool-btn" href="files/cv.pdf" download>
    <i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> Download
  </a>
</div>

<iframe id="cv-frame" src="files/cv.pdf" class="pdf-frame" title="CV — Félix P. Leiva"></iframe>

<script>
document.getElementById('pdf-fullscreen-btn').addEventListener('click', function() {
  var f = document.getElementById('cv-frame');
  if (f.requestFullscreen) f.requestFullscreen();
  else if (f.webkitRequestFullscreen) f.webkitRequestFullscreen();
});
</script>
```
